Motion To Compel Defendant Zhen Zhen Li To Appear For Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER, Esq. (Tel: 415-398-9001) for plaintiffs;
Atty. JEFFREY A. CHEN, Esq. (Tel: 415-369-9089) for defendants Immersion 5 LLC, L'Academy Corporation, and Zhen Zhen Li.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS FIONA MCDOUGALL-VILLET, AND JONATHAN VILLET's Motion To Compel Defendant Zhen Zhen Li To Appear For Deposition.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Zhen Zhen Li shall appear for deposition in person or via Zoom at the option of moving party within ten days of the date of order.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Set For Trial On Sep-06-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
